g.text: FABIO capital per item for United States (USA) — a FABIO-internal decomposition; the World Bank reference is
TOTAL-only, so no WB line is drawn. Blue line/triangles on the Primary (ISIC-A) row(s) = external A01+A03
capital benchmark (OECD_SUT; exported by scripts 02/03), a primary-agriculture, forestry-free reference for
the covered years. Items grouped as "Other" exactly as in the TOTAL figure (below 3% max |share| of WB across
